name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new mode, metric, data source, or UI improvement
title: "feat: <short description>"
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

<!-- One sentence describing the feature. -->

## Motivation

<!-- Why is this useful? What problem does it solve? Who benefits? -->

## Proposed Solution

<!-- Describe what you'd like to happen. Be as specific as you can.
     If this is a new exploration mode, describe:
     - What question it answers
     - What data it uses
     - What the visualisation looks like
     If this is a new metric, describe:
     - How it is calculated
     - What the numerator and denominator are
     - What it means in plain language
-->

## Alternatives Considered

<!-- Have you thought of other ways to solve this? Why is your proposal better? -->

## Data Availability

<!-- Is the data already in the database? Does it require a new ETL step?
     Does it require a new external data source (e.g. Unpaywall, OpenAlex)?
-->

- [ ] Data already exists in the database
- [ ] Needs a new ETL computation
- [ ] Needs a new external data source

## Additional Context

<!-- Mockups, sketches, links to similar features in other tools, relevant papers, etc. -->
